prompt:
We want to introduce built-in latency telemetry across the entire Hugging Face Pipelines architecture for debugging purposes. Update the base class to accept a new keyword argument record_latency: bool = False, and save it as an instance attribute. You must update every pipeline class in src/transformers/pipelines/  that implements _forward method. Modify each method so that if self._record_latency is True, it records the exact time taken by the underlying model inference call using time.perf_counter and stores it on the pipeline instance for later inspection.

Verification: Ensure ruff check passes across the entire pipelines directory. Do not run any other checks

for ruff commands, use the local .venv
